name: ICICI Amazon Pay Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Lifetime free - no joining or annual fee

categoryRates.description: 5% cashback on Amazon purchases for Prime members
2% cashback on Amazon purchases for non-Prime members
2% cashback on paying bills and utility payments

redemptionOptions: Pay at Amazon Pay partner merchants

welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

additionalBenefits: Lifetime free - no annual or joining fee ever
Cashback auto-credited as Amazon Pay Balance
No minimum redemption threshold for cashback
pros: Lifetime free with zero annual and joining fee
Excellent 5% cashback on Amazon for Prime members
Cashback credited as Amazon Pay Balance with no redemption hassle
Decent 2% on bill payments and utilities
1% baseline cashback on all other spends
cons: Cashback is only as Amazon Pay Balance, not direct bank credit
Non-Prime members get only 2% on Amazon
idealFor: Amazon Prime members who shop frequently on Amazon
Users looking for a lifetime free card with solid cashback
Anyone who regularly pays bills and utilities online

faqs.question: Is the ICICI Amazon Pay Credit Card truly lifetime free?
faqs.answer: Yes, the card has no joining fee and no annual fee for the lifetime of the card. There are no hidden charges or spend-based conditions to maintain the free status.

faqs.question: How is the cashback credited?
faqs.answer: Cashback is automatically credited to your Amazon Pay Balance within a few days of the transaction. You can use this balance for purchases on Amazon.in or at any Amazon Pay partner merchant.

faqs.question: Do I need Amazon Prime to get 5% cashback?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 5% cashback on Amazon purchases is exclusive to Amazon Prime members. Non-Prime members receive 2% cashback on Amazon purchases. A Prime membership costs ₹1,499/year.

faqs.question: Can I use the Amazon Pay Balance outside Amazon?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amazon Pay Balance can be used at various partner merchants including Swiggy, BigBasket, BookMyShow, and many others. It can also be used for utility bill payments through Amazon.
